allow: Bash("C:/Users/marku/AppData/Local/nvm/v22.18.0/node.exe" -e "const fs=require\('fs'\),p='nextfrontend/messages';let ok=true;for\(const f of fs.readdirSync\(p\)\){if\(!f.endsWith\('.json'\)\)continue;try{const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(p+'/'+f,'utf8'\)\);const h=j.hero||{};const leftover=['badge','scrollHint','statsProjects','statsSkills','statsLanguages'].filter\(k=>k in h\);console.log\(f,'OK', leftover.length?\('STILL HAS:'+leftover\):'hero clean'\)}catch\(e\){ok=false;console.log\(f,'PARSE ERROR',e.message\)}}process.exit\(ok?0:1\)")
